response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive software engineering and technical leadership experience, he fundamentally lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience, possessing only about 7 months of professional C++ exposure. Furthermore, his background is predominantly in full-stack web development and application-level microservices (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) rather than the low-level, large-scale compute infrastructure and hardware architecture required for a Cloud Compute Platform Technical Lead.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring experience, including organizing workshops, coding dojos, and acting as a Staff Engineer.
Strong background in software design, architecture, and testing methodologies such as TDD and CI/CD.
Proven experience building and scaling high-throughput distributed systems and microservices.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience.
Lacks deep, production-level experience building core internal cloud compute platforms, storage, or hardware architecture.
Technology stack heavily leans towards web technologies and DLang rather than the systems-level engineering required for this role.
